debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∀ (s : ℂ), ¬CriticalStrip s → riemannZeta s = 0 → deriv riemannZeta s ≠ 0

failed_attempts:
by
  intro s hs hζ
  -- There are no zeros of ζ(s) outside the critical strip; hence the implication is vacuous.
  exfalso
  exact (riemannZeta_ne_zero_of_re_le_zero_or_re_ge_one s (by
    by_contra h
    exact hs (by
      have : 0 < s.re ∧ s.re < 1 := by
        simpa [CriticalStrip, not_or, not_le, not_lt] using h
      simpa [CriticalStrip] using this)) ) hζ

  have : riemannZeta s ≠ 0 := by
    simpa [hzero] using (by exact (zero_ne_one : (0:ℂ) ≠ 1))
  exact (this hzero).elim
